title: TableRow
description: Table row component. Container for cell components.

path.description: A JSON Pointer path to a value in the state

SlotNode.description: Slot binding: Reference to a specific child node.

items.description: The unique identifier for a component

StaticChildren.description: A static list of child component IDs.

TemplateChildren.description: A template for generating a dynamic list of children from a data model list. The `componentId` is the component to use as a template.

componentId.description: The unique identifier for a component

path.description: The path to the list of component property objects in the data model.

expandedRowRender.description: Expanded content template. Renders with current row data context (use relative paths).

children.description: Cell components within the row. The order must match the order of columns defined in the parent Table.
